channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Bahrain summons Iraqi envoy as pro-Iranian attacks persist in Gulf
item.description: Move reflects regional alarm over attacks by pro-Iranian groups based in Iraq, which continue despite ceasefire.

item.title: Iran releases assets of women’s football captain in Australia asylum row
item.description: Zahra Ghanbari, one of the six players who sought asylum in Australia, reversed her decision and returned to Iran.

item.title: Lebanon Latest: Talks scheduled as Israeli strikes continue
item.description: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon push death toll past 2,000, as talks loom and ceasefire divisions deepen.

item.title: What do we know about sea mines in and around the Strait of Hormuz?
item.description: The psychological terror that the presence of sea mines can generate could paralyse the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Trump says Iranian ships to be ‘eliminated’ as US naval blockade begins
item.description: Iran describes the siege against its ports as the US president's 'revenge of choice' against the global economy.

item.title: Trump’s threat to blockade Hormuz: Why it’s the latest major escalation
item.description: Analysts warn Washington's blockade could harm the fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran.

item.title: Pakistan eyes narrow window to resuscitate US-Iran talks after breakdown
item.description: US and Iran end marathon Islamabad talks without agreement, leaving fragile ceasefire under growing strain.

item.title: At least six killed in Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon
item.description: Attacks come as Israel says it is close to taking over a major town in the south, and before peace talks in the US.

item.title: Tear gas fired at India workers demanding higher wages as living costs rise
item.description: Factory workers protest in national capital's suburb of Noida as living costs across the world rise due to the Iran war.

item.title: How the US-Iran talks in Islamabad unfolded
item.description: Pakistan has been under the spotlight as it managed what others couldn’t due to its ties with the Gulf, US and China.
